name: SupplyMind Seller Agent
description: Autonomous B2B seller agent for office supplies. Accepts purchase tasks via A2A, serves a UCP-compliant catalog, and settles payments in USDC via Circle Programmable Wallets.

capabilities.description: Serves a machine-readable JSON-LD product catalog
Accepts purchase order tasks and returns confirmation with total cost
Returns custom bulk quotes. Orders over $500 require a $0.10 USDC micro-payment via x402 before quote is released.

payment.note: Phase 4 activates real USDC settlement via Circle Programmable Wallets
